opportunityJson.title: Opportunity JSON
opportunityJson.description: 업데이트 정보를 담은 JSON 문자열. opportunityId(필수), contractNumber, servicePeriod, engineerGrade, contractPeriod, maker를 포함합니다. 예: {"opportunityId":"006XX","contractNumber":"CNT-001","servicePeriod":"12개월","engineerGrade":"Senior","contractPeriod":"2026-01 ~ 2026-12","maker":"홍길동"}
